1.kj: (in) abound(-undance, -ant, -antly), captain, elder, enough, exceedingly, full, great(-ly, man, one), increase, long (enough, (time)), (do, have) many(-ifold, things, a time), (shi

1.gl: elevation, i.e. the act (literally, a journey to a higher place, figuratively, a thought arising), or (concretely) the condition (literally, a step or grademark, figuratively, a superiority of station); specifically a cl
1.kj: things that come up, (high) degree, deal, go up, stair, step, story.

1.gl: 'I pray', 'now', or 'then'; added mostly to verbs (in the Imperative or Future), or to interjections, occasionally to an adverb or conjunction
1.kj: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh.
1.dv: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered;

1.gl: to cramp, literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive
1.kj: adversary, (be in) afflict(-ion), beseige, bind (up), (be in, bring) distress, enemy, narrower, oppress, pangs, shut up, be in a strait (trouble), vex.

1.gl: (only in plural collectively or emphatic form) youth, the state (juvenility) or the persons (young people)
1.dv: or נָעֻר; and (feminine) נְעֻרָה; properly, passive participle from H5288 (נַעַר) as denominative;

2.gl: abundant (in quantity, size, age, number, rank, quality)
2.kj: (in) abound(-undance, -ant, -antly), captain, elder, enough, exceedingly, full, great(-ly, man, one), increase, long (enough, (time)), (do, have) many(-ifold, things, a time), (shi

2.gl: to cramp, literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive
2.kj: adversary, (be in) afflict(-ion), beseige, bind (up), (be in, bring) distress, enemy, narrower, oppress, pangs, shut up, be in a strait (trouble), vex.

2.gl: to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)
2.kj: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.

2.gl: (only in plural collectively or emphatic form) youth, the state (juvenility) or the persons (young people)
2.dv: or נָעֻר; and (feminine) נְעֻרָה; properly, passive participle from H5288 (נַעַר) as denominative;

3.gl: to scratch, i.e. (by implication) to engrave, plough; hence (from the use of tools) to fabricate (of any material); figuratively, to devise (in a bad sense); hence (from the idea of secrecy) to be silent, to let alone; h
3.kj: [idiom] altogether, cease, conceal, be deaf, devise, ear, graven, imagine, leave off speaking, hold peace, plow(-er, man), be quiet, rest, practise secretly, keep silence, be silen

3.gl: the back (as rounded); by analogy, the top or rim, a boss, a vault, arch of eye, bulwarks, etc.
3.kj: back, body, boss, eminent (higher) place, (eye) brows, nave, ring.
3.dv: from an unused root meaning to hollow or curve; (compare H1460 (גֵּו) and H1479 (גּוּף))

3.gl: to be (causative, make) long (literally or figuratively)
3.kj: defer, draw out, lengthen, (be, become, make, pro-) long, [phrase] (out-, over-) live, tarry (long).

3.dv: from H6031 (עָנָה), in the sense of depression or tilling;

4.gl: something intwined, i.e. a string, wreath or foliage
4.kj: band, cord, rope, thick bough (branch), wreathen (chain).
4.dv: or עֲבוֹת; or (feminine) עֲבֹתָה; the same as H5687 (עָבֹת);

4.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

4.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
4.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.
cut (asunder, in pieces, in sunder, off), [idiom] utmost.

5.gl: properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed
5.kj: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.

5.gl: the hinder part; hence (adverb) behind, backward; also (as facing north) the West
5.kj: after(-ward), back (part, -side, -ward), hereafter, (be-) hind(-er part), time to come, without.

5.gl: properly, to flinch, i.e. (by implication) to go back, literally (to retreat) or figuratively (to apostatize)
5.kj: backslider, drive, go back, turn (away, back).

5.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
5.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

6.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
6.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

6.gl: to be ashamed, confused or disappointed; also (as failing) to dry up (as water) or wither (as herbage)
6.kj: be ashamed, clean, be confounded, (make) dry (up), (do) shame(-fully), [idiom] utterly, wither (away).

6.dv: perhaps originally the same as H2681 (חָצִיר), from the greenness of a courtyard;

6.gl: a roof; by analogy, the top of an altar
6.kj: roof (of the house), (house) top (of the house).

6.gl: to pull out, up or off

7.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
7.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

7.gl: the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power
7.kj: branch, [phrase] foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon.

7.gl: to dock off, i.e. curtail (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative); especially to harvest (grass or grain)
7.kj: [idiom] at all, cut down, much discouraged, grieve, harvestman, lothe, mourn, reap(-er), (be, wax) short(-en, -er), straiten, trouble, vex.

7.dv: a primitive root; properly, apparently to heap; figuratively, to chastise (as if piling blows); specifically (as denominative from H6016 (עֹמֶר))

7.gl: the bosom (as comprised between the arms)
7.dv: from an unused root meaning to hold firmly;

8.gl: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
8.kj: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, ge
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

8.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
8.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

8.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
8.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

8.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
8.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
